dashboard.title: Today's Ledger
dashboard.empty: Stomach's clean as a whistle. No intake entries recorded yet.
dashboard.guestBanner: Tracking as a guest boss. Lock in your balance sheet whenever you like.

history.title: Nutrient Ledger
history.subtitle: Review your metabolic balance sheet
history.empty: Nothing booked to the ledger this day.

log.label: Label
log.snapHint: Point at the plate. We know the local classics.
log.speakHint: Type or talk, mix English and Cantonese like a real order.
log.speakExample: e.g. 朝早食咗一碗麥片加 mixed berries
log.scanHint: Line up the barcode. HK products start with 489.
log.notFound: The waiter is confused by this item. Let's log it manually!
log.recognising: The kitchen is prepping your snapshot...

custom.title: Tweak the order
custom.hint: Tap to tweak, just like ordering at the cha chaan teng.

recipes.title: Recipe Box
recipes.urlHint: Paste any recipe link, or try a demo below.
recipes.empty: No recipes yet. Add one to fire up the kitchen.
recipes.deleteBody: {{name}} will be permanently removed. This can't be undone.

healthy.banner: Healthy mode on. Swapped in lighter picks for the ingredients and steps.

cook.hint: Hands messy? Tap Voice or Wave to move hands-free.

pantry.title: Pantry
pantry.cookNowHint: Dishes you can make with what's in stock
pantry.empty: Pantry's bare. Add what's in your kitchen.

pantryScan.title: Scan your kitchen
pantryScan.hint: Point at your ingredients and snap
pantryScan.permissionBody: Let Siu Tim Siu Dai use the camera to spot what's in your kitchen. Nothing saves until you review it.

pantryReview.title: Review & edit
pantryReview.subtitle: AI can misread. Fix names, amounts, or units, delete anything wrong, and add what it missed before saving.
pantryReview.empty: Nothing caught. Add items by hand, or go back and scan again.

grocery.title: Grocery list
grocery.empty: No list yet. Pick a few recipes and we'll write it up.

profile.title: Profile
profile.signInHint: Back up your logs, recipes and pantry across devices.
profile.textSize: Text follows your device size settings

health.title: Nutrition needs
health.subtitle: Estimate your daily targets from your body and activity.
health.activityVeryActiveHint: Hard training or a physical job
health.microsUpsell: Upgrade to Pro to track detailed vitamins & minerals
health.disclaimer: A rough estimate for general guidance, not medical advice. See a doctor or dietitian for personal advice.
health.applied: Targets updated. Your calorie goal is now {{count}} kcal.
health.summaryUnset: Set your height, weight and activity to get daily targets.

onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: Track what you eat, cook from your recipe box, and keep the pantry stocked. In Cantonese or English.
onboarding.feature1Title: Log by snap, voice or barcode
onboarding.feature1Body: Add a meal in seconds. We know the local classics, from cha chaan teng to dai pai dong.
onboarding.feature2Body: Save recipes, scale servings, and swap in substitutes when you run out.
onboarding.feature3Body: See your calorie and macro budget at a glance, then build grocery lists from what you cook.

auth.title: Welcome
auth.subtitleSignIn: Sign in to sync your logs across devices.
auth.subtitleSignUp: Create an account to get started.
auth.previewNotice: Sign in is unavailable in this preview build.
auth.legal: By continuing, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
auth.callbackFailed: That link didn't work. Please try signing in again.
auth.errPasswordShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
auth.errPasswordWeak: Use at least 8 characters with an uppercase letter, a lowercase letter, a number, and a symbol.
auth.errAlreadyRegistered: An account with this email already exists.
auth.errNotConfirmed: Please verify your email before signing in.
auth.errUnavailable: Sign in is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
auth.errGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

verify.title: Verify your email
verify.body: We sent a verification link to {{email}}. Tap the link, then come back and continue.
verify.notYet: Not verified yet. Tap the link in the email, then try again.

profileSetup.title: Let's set your targets
profileSetup.subtitle: A few details so we can size up your daily calorie and macro budget. You can change these anytime.

family.title: My Family
family.subtitle: Link family members so you can view and manage their meal logs.
family.maxOnly: Family linking is a Max plan feature.
family.maxOnlyBody: Upgrade to Max to invite family members and manage their meal logs from your account.
family.linkHint: Share this link with your family member. It works for 7 days and can be used once.
family.membersEmpty: No one linked yet. Create an invitation to get started.
family.removeBody: You will no longer be able to view or manage their meal logs. They keep their own account and data.
family.leaveBody: Your manager will no longer be able to view or manage your meal logs.
family.errGenerate: Could not create an invitation. Please try again.
family.errMaxRequired: An active Max plan is required to invite family members.
family.acceptBody: {{inviter}} has invited you to link your account to their family. They will be able to view and manage your meal logs. You keep your own account and can leave at any time.
family.signInToAcceptBody: Sign in or create an account first, then this invitation will continue.
family.accepted: You're linked. {{inviter}} can now help manage your meal logs.
family.errInvalid: This invitation link is not valid.
family.errExpired: This invitation has expired. Ask your family member for a new link.
family.errAlreadyUsed: This invitation has already been used.
family.errAlreadyLinked: Your account is already linked to a family.
family.errSelf: You can't accept your own invitation.
family.errAcceptGeneric: Could not accept this invitation. Please try again.
